title: Media, Technology, and News Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: To show or tell what you think or feel.
choices: express
allege
influence
rounds.answer: express
rounds.explanation: express: To show or tell what you think or feel.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Likely to do something or to be affected by something.
choices: express
allege
liable
rounds.answer: liable
rounds.explanation: liable: Likely to do something or to be affected by something.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Hardworking and productive.
choices: allege
industrious
express
rounds.answer: industrious
rounds.explanation: industrious: Hardworking and productive.

games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: A change or addition to a law or document.
A person who helps different groups communicate and work together.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'exonerated' mean in this unit?
choices: To be declared not guilty of a crime or blame.
To show or tell what you think or feel.
To say that something is true, but not prove it yet.
rounds.answer: To be declared not guilty of a crime or blame.
rounds.explanation: exonerated: To be declared not guilty of a crime or blame.

rounds.prompt: What does 'consecutive' mean in this unit?
choices: To show or tell what you think or feel.
To say that something is true, but not prove it yet.
Happening one after another without any breaks.
rounds.answer: Happening one after another without any breaks.
rounds.explanation: consecutive: Happening one after another without any breaks.
